title: Filter Template
excerpt:
Hi everyone, 
I was thinking in a feature: “FILTER TEMPLATES”. It would be amazing if one could save a filter template and paste/use it in another (similar) board. 
Hope it can be done, 
See ya!

posts.author: JoseDaher (Jose Daher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I was thinking in a feature: “FILTER TEMPLATES”. It would be amazing if one could save a filter template and paste/use it in another (similar) board.

Hope it can be done,

See ya!
